description: Create a Jupyter notebook version of cloud_translate.py for debugging translation quality issues, with each pipeline stage broken into separate cells with markdown explanations and intermediate output display.

userStories.title: Create notebook with setup and configuration cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a notebook that loads dependencies and configuration from environment variables so that I can run the pipeline in an isolated debugging environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Notebook imports all required dependencies (yt-dlp, openai, replicate, deep_translator, etc.)
Environment variables loaded via dotenv
API clients initialized (OpenAI, Replicate)
Configuration variables displayed (OUTPUT_DIR, API key status, model names)
Helper functions from cloud_translate.py available (parse_timestamp, etc.)
Markdown cell explains what each import/config does
Typecheck passes (for any .py helper modules)
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 1. Created debug_pipeline.ipynb with setup and configuration cell.

userStories.title: Create input configuration cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a cell where I can specify the video URL, target language, and processing options so that I can easily test different inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: Cell defines VIDEO_URL, TARGET_LANGUAGE, and DURATION_LIMIT variables
Toggle variable USE_MULTI_SPEAKER (True/False) for synthesis mode selection
Markdown explains supported URL formats and language codes
Example values provided as comments
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 2. Added input configuration cells with VIDEO_URL, TARGET_LANGUAGE, DURATION_LIMIT, USE_MULTI_SPEAKER variables. Includes comprehensive markdown documentation with URL formats, language codes table, and multi-speaker mode explanation.

userStories.title: Create video info retrieval cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to fetch and display video metadata before downloading so that I can verify the correct video is being processed.
acceptanceCriteria: Cell uses yt-dlp to extract video info without downloading
Displays: title, duration, video ID, thumbnail URL
Shows estimated price calculation
Handles errors gracefully with informative messages
Markdown explains yt-dlp info extraction
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 3. Added video info retrieval cells with yt-dlp extract_info, price calculation, and error handling.

userStories.title: Create video download cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to download the video file so that I can inspect the source material.
acceptanceCriteria: Downloads video using yt-dlp with configured options
Applies duration limit trimming via ffmpeg if DURATION_LIMIT is set
Displays download progress and final file size
Shows path to downloaded video file
Markdown explains download process and format selection
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 4. Added video download cell with yt-dlp download, ffmpeg duration trimming, file size display, and comprehensive error handling.

userStories.title: Create audio extraction cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to extract audio from the video so that I can inspect the audio before processing.
acceptanceCriteria: Extracts audio using ffmpeg (16kHz, mono, PCM)
Displays audio file path and duration
Shows audio file size
Markdown explains audio format requirements for Whisper
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 5. Added audio extraction cells with ffmpeg (16kHz, mono, PCM), file size display, duration display via ffprobe, and comprehensive error handling.

userStories.title: Create audio separation cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to separate vocals from background music so that I can verify the separation quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls Replicate Demucs API for audio separation
Downloads and saves vocals.wav and background.wav
Displays file paths for both stems
Shows API call timing
Markdown explains Demucs separation and why it improves transcription
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 6. Added audio separation cells with Replicate Demucs API, base64 data URI encoding, vocals/background download, timing display, and fallback error handling.

userStories.title: Create speaker diarization cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to identify different speakers in the audio so that I can verify speaker detection accuracy.
acceptanceCriteria: Uploads vocals to storage for API access
Calls Replicate speaker-diarization API
Parses and displays diarization segments with speaker labels
Shows number of speakers detected
Displays segment list as formatted table (speaker, start, end, duration)
Markdown explains diarization and speaker label format
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 7. Added speaker diarization cells with Replicate files.create() upload, meronym/speaker-diarization API call, speaker label conversion (A,B->SPEAKER_00,01), formatted segment table, per-speaker statistics, and comprehensive error handling.

userStories.title: Create voice sample extraction cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to extract voice samples for each speaker so that I can verify voice cloning input quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Extracts longest segment for each speaker using ffmpeg
Saves samples as {SPEAKER_ID}_sample.wav files
Uploads samples to storage and gets signed URLs
Displays speaker_voice_urls dictionary
Shows sample durations for each speaker
Markdown explains voice sample requirements for Chatterbox
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create transcription cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to transcribe the vocals so that I can inspect the raw transcription quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls OpenAI Whisper API with verbose_json response
Parses segments with timestamps
Displays segments as formatted table (index, start, end, text)
Shows total segment count and detected language
Shows API call timing
Markdown explains Whisper API parameters and segment format
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create translation cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to translate the transcribed segments so that I can compare original and translated text side-by-side.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls Replicate LLM for context-aware translation (batched if needed)
Displays translated segments as table (index, original_text, translated_text)
Shows translation comparison for quality inspection
Shows API call timing and batch count
Markdown explains LLM translation approach and batching strategy
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create single-speaker synthesis cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a cell that synthesizes all text with a single voice so that I can compare against multi-speaker output.
acceptanceCriteria: Only executes if USE_MULTI_SPEAKER is False
Combines all translated text
Calls Chatterbox API with first available voice sample
Saves output as translated_audio_single.wav
Displays audio file path and duration
Shows API call timing
Markdown explains single-speaker synthesis fallback mode
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create multi-speaker synthesis cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to synthesize each segment with the matched speaker's voice so that I can verify voice cloning and timing.
acceptanceCriteria: Only executes if USE_MULTI_SPEAKER is True
Matches each segment to speaker via diarization overlap
Calls Chatterbox API for each segment with matched voice
Displays progress during synthesis (segment X of Y)
Shows segment-to-speaker mapping as table
Combines segments with adjusted timing (no overlap)
Saves output as translated_audio_multi.wav
Markdown explains speaker matching algorithm and timing adjustment
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create audio mixing cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to mix the translated speech with background audio so that I can verify the mix levels.
acceptanceCriteria: Mixes translated speech (100%) with background (30% default)
Allows configurable BACKGROUND_VOLUME variable
Saves output as mixed_audio.wav
Displays file path and duration
Markdown explains mixing process and volume levels
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create subtitle generation cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to generate SRT subtitles so that I can verify subtitle timing and content.
acceptanceCriteria: Generates SRT file from translated segments
Displays first 10 subtitle entries as preview
Shows total subtitle count
Saves output as subtitles.srt
Markdown explains SRT format and timestamp conversion
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create final video merge cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to merge the translated audio with the original video so that I can produce the final output.
acceptanceCriteria: Merges video with mixed audio using ffmpeg
Embeds subtitles as soft subs (mov_text codec)
Saves output as {title}_translated.mp4
Displays final output path and file size
Shows total pipeline execution time
Markdown explains ffmpeg merge command and subtitle embedding
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create summary and comparison cell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a final summary cell that displays timing for all stages so that I can identify bottlenecks.
acceptanceCriteria: Displays timing breakdown for each pipeline stage
Shows total execution time
Lists all output file paths
Provides quality checklist (items to manually verify)
Markdown summarizes the full pipeline and suggests debugging approaches
Typecheck passes
